config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsModelConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Model Configuration"
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Model Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ModelConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Model Configuration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
		messageType = 'modelPanel'   
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		Action = "Update"
		system.perspective.print(selectedRow)
		# [{u'LineTypeCode': u'TA', u'BOM_Code': u'TM567', u'IsActive': True, u'Mode': u'Verticle', u'Id': 36L, u'IsConfigured': True}]
		for data in	selectedRow:
			Id = data['MST_ModelConfiguration_Id']
			lineTypeCode = data["LineTypeCode"]
			bOM_Code = data["M_BOMNumber"]
			isActive=data["IsActive"]
			if isActive:
				isActive = 1
			else:
				isActive = 0
			mode = data["Mode"]
			isConfigured=data["IsConfigured"]
			payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
			'lineTypeCode':data["LineTypeCode"],
			'code':data["M_BOM_Id"],
			'mode':data["Mode"],
			'isActive':isActive,
			'isConfigured':data["IsConfigured"],
			'Action':Action}	
				
		folderName = 'Project_VECV/ModelConfiguration'
		colName = 'Id'
		self.session.custom.selectedModelConfigId= Id
		
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
			
	except:
		screenName ='model Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/Model ConfigurationDraft')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/tblModelMaster')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'modelPanel'  
		Action = "Save" 				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'id':'','code':-1,'mode':'','isActive':1,'lineTypeCode':''} 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except:   
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Model Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/ModelPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/tblImage')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Pass dropdown values to custom params. 
	"""
	try:
		self.view.params.Code=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntCode").getChild("drpCode").props.value
		self.view.params.Mode=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntMode").getChild("drpMode").props.value
		self.view.params.Model=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
	except:
		screenName ='Model Configuration Filter'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/ModelPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all selections. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntMode").getChild("drpMode").props.value = ''
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value = ''
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntCode").getChild("drpCode").props.value = -1
	self.view.params.Mode = ''
	self.view.params.Code = -1
	self.view.params.Model = ''
